company_profile.description: Media technology company delivering streaming and PayTV integration software through subsidiaries Amino and 24i.
company_profile.note: Formerly Amino Technologies PLC; renamed Aferian 2021

founders_ceo.note: Originally founded as Amino Technologies (1997); public company (LSE: AFRN); subsidiary CEOs: Sebastian Braun (24i)

funding_financial.total_raised: Public company (LSE: AFRN); pre-IPO PE backing
